headline: Fastenal (FAST) Valuation Check As Shares Move On Recent Price Action
summary: Fastenal stock at a glance Fastenal (FAST) is back on many investors’ screens after a recent move in the share price. This has prompted a closer look at how its current valuation lines up with recent returns and fundamentals. See our latest analysis for Fastenal. The recent 3.9% 1-day share price return, with the stock now at $46.46, comes after a solid year to date, while a slightly weaker 90-day share price return suggests momentum has cooled a little even as multi year total shareholder...
